Metadata.title: Pre-Owned Cars in India | Veloce
Metadata.description: Trusted pre-owned and luxury cars. Every vehicle checked properly. Fair pricing. Easy buying.

Footer.tagline: Quality pre-owned cars. All inspected. All transparent.

HeroSection.body: Find quality used cars with full inspection reports. Transparent prices. No hidden charges. We make buying a car simple and fair.

FeaturedVehicles.errorBody: We're updating our list. Check back in a moment.

InventoryCTA.heading: Browse all available cars.
InventoryCTA.body: Every car is checked. All prices are real.

HowItWorks.heading: Simple. Fair. Fast.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Look at all available cars online. Check photos, details, and history. Pick what you like.
HowItWorks.step2Body: Come to our showroom or arrange a visit. Test drive the car. We answer all your questions.
HowItWorks.step3Body: Easy paperwork. Flexible payment options. Drive home the same day if you want.

ReserveCTA.showroomHeading: Come see the cars in person.
ReserveCTA.hours: Monday to Saturday, 10 AM to 6 PM

VehicleGrid.errorBody: Please wait. We're updating the list.
VehicleGrid.emptyBody: Check back soon. We add new cars regularly.

EnquiryModal.heading: Get more info about this car
EnquiryModal.messagePlaceholder: Ask us anything about this car or the buying process.
EnquiryModal.disclaimer: We will not share your info with anyone.
EnquiryModal.successBody: We will call you within 24 hours.
EnquiryModal.validationPhone: Please enter a valid Indian phone number: +91 98765 43210
EnquiryModal.submissionFailed: Could not send. Please try again.
